source.remote_observed: origin/main@945b2d8 via git fetch; GitHub README checked 2026-06-20
source.boundary: Qiaomu-owned abstractions of public case style grammar. No upstream templates, exact wording, image assets, prompts, or code are used at runtime.

recommendation_contract.purpose: Add case-proven PPT style directions from ppt-master examples to qiaomu-ppt style recommendation.
recommendation_contract.usage: Use as inspiration for style_brief.md, spec_lock.json, visual_asset_manifest.json, page_rhythm, page_layouts, and page_charts.

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Academic Blueprint

source.readme_summary: Technical paper deck with source figures, formulas, diagrams, result tables, and a cool blueprint palette.

typography.body: Noto Sans CJK SC / IBM Plex Sans
typography.headline_treatment: claim-first technical titles, roomy leading for multiline CJK, formulas never squeezed under titles

layout_rules: Use page rhythm anchor, dense, and breathing. Dense pages may hold formulas and tables, but one proof object remains dominant.
Source paper figures should be rebuilt or annotated as editable foreground objects when practical.
No-crop policy for equations, tables, and source figures unless a crop is explicitly documented.
ppt.media_policy: Use paper figures, extracted diagrams, formulas, and tables as evidence. Generated images may provide quiet blueprint atmosphere only and must not fake research evidence.
ppt.chart_policy: Prefer native tables, result bars, architecture diagrams, formula callouts, and comparison columns. Split unreadable source tables across slides.
ppt.animation_hint: Use step reveal for mechanism diagrams and formula decomposition; keep chart animation simple and speaker controlled.

styles.description_summary: A cool technical blueprint direction for paper-to-PPT decks where source figures, formulas, tables, and editable diagrams carry the argument.
styles.recommendation_text: Academic Blueprint paper arxiv Hugging Face research seminar technical blueprint formula table architecture attention transformer source figure diagram result chart 论文 论文解读 技术蓝图 公式 表格 架构图 TeX 图表

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Data Journalism

source.readme_summary: Bloomberg/Economist-style data journalism with dense chart variety, dark editorial canvas, source captions, and direct labels.

typography.display: Noto Serif CJK SC / Source Serif 4
typography.body: Noto Sans CJK SC / IBM Plex Sans
typography.mono: Sarasa Mono SC / IBM Plex Mono
typography.headline_treatment: editorial claim titles paired with direct chart labels and source captions

layout_rules: Charts and numbers are the main visuals. Images should be rare, contextual, and cinematic.
Use hairlines, source captions, and direct labels. Avoid decorative chart chrome.
Keep each dense page to one analytical question, even when multiple micro charts appear.
ppt.media_policy: Use source data, tables, market maps, brand icons, and rare atmosphere images. Never invent data to fill a chart.
ppt.chart_policy: Use varied native charts: KPI cards, bar, dumbbell, bubble, donut, comparison table, Sankey, Pareto, dual-axis, hub-spoke, and quadrant. Direct label data and cite sources in notes or visible captions when requested.
ppt.animation_hint: Reveal by analytical layer: headline, chart frame, highlighted series, implication.

styles.description_summary: A dense Bloomberg/Economist direction for market, finance, and strategy decks where chart diversity and source discipline are the visual engine.
styles.recommendation_text: Data Journalism Bloomberg Economist finance market capital AI capital report chart dashboard micro chart source line annual review 数据新闻 彭博 经济学人 资本 年度报告 图表 市场

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Architecture Editorial

source.readme_summary: Architecture editorial deck with image-heavy storytelling, calm stone palette, captions, and museum-catalog pacing.

typography.display: Noto Serif CJK SC / Cormorant Garamond
typography.headline_treatment: museum-catalog headlines with generous line height and precise captions

layout_rules: Let one strong image own the page when available. Do not place many small photos just to show abundance.
Use captions as evidence, not decoration.
Use quiet paper surfaces and restrained accents around photography.
ppt.media_policy: Prioritize rights-clear architecture photography, source images, maps, sketches, and detail crops. Generated images may provide mood only when no factual image is required.
ppt.chart_policy: Use timelines, map callouts, caption grids, and simple comparison tables. Avoid charting when a photograph plus caption is the proof.
ppt.animation_hint: Use slow photo reveal, caption reveal, and chapter pacing; avoid flashy transitions.

styles.description_summary: A museum-catalog editorial direction for image-rich architecture, culture, biography, and design decks.
styles.recommendation_text: Architecture Editorial Pritzker museum catalog photo essay culture biography place storytelling 建筑 建筑摄影 普利兹克 策展 文化 人物传记 图片丰富

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Swiss Grid

source.readme_summary: Strict Swiss grid style with modular layout, monochrome type, red accent, and diagrammatic clarity.

avoid_for: topics that need tactile handmade texture

typography.display: Noto Sans CJK SC / Helvetica Neue
typography.body: Noto Sans CJK SC / IBM Plex Sans
typography.mono: Sarasa Mono SC / IBM Plex Mono
typography.headline_treatment: asymmetric grid, direct claim, no decorative display tricks

layout_rules: Declare columns, rows, margins, and baselines in spec_lock before rendering.
Use thin rules as functional alignment and table structure, not decoration.
Let red accent mark hierarchy or sequence only.
ppt.media_policy: Use diagrams, annotated screenshots, source images, or simple geometric visualizations. Avoid atmosphere images unless they serve as evidence.
ppt.chart_policy: Prefer clear tables, matrices, timelines, process diagrams, and directly labeled bar charts.
ppt.animation_hint: Use reveal by grid cell, method step, or comparison row.

styles.description_summary: A disciplined Swiss grid direction for method, framework, education, and cleanup decks that need clarity before atmosphere.
styles.recommendation_text: Swiss grid typography minimal methodology courseware framework cleanup red accent modular grid 瑞士 网格 版式 极简 方法论 课件 可读

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Glassmorphism SaaS

source.readme_summary: Product launch style with frosted panels, gradient depth, UI screenshots, KPI panels, and AI-agent architecture.

avoid_for: strict LibreOffice-only output without fallback surfaces

typography.display: Noto Sans CJK SC / Inter Display
typography.headline_treatment: large product claims with restrained glow, never tiny text inside glass cards

layout_rules: Use glass panels sparingly and provide solid fallback surfaces for PPTX conversion.
Do not stack cards inside translucent cards.
Keep screenshots legible and annotate with editable callouts.
ppt.media_policy: Use real product screenshots, UI flows, architecture diagrams, and generated atmosphere backgrounds. Generated images must not fake UI.
ppt.chart_policy: Use KPI panels, timeline, funnel, product metric trends, and architecture maps. Charts must remain readable on dark translucent surfaces.
ppt.animation_hint: Use subtle depth reveal for product surface, then callouts and workflow steps.

styles.description_summary: A polished AI SaaS product direction with controlled frosted depth, real UI screenshots, and editable technical proof objects.
styles.recommendation_text: Glassmorphism frosted glass SaaS AI agent product launch UI screenshot gradient KPI architecture 玻璃拟态 毛玻璃 产品发布 智能体 界面截图

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Memphis Pop

source.readme_summary: Vivid flat Memphis launch deck with geometric motifs, playful hierarchy, event energy, and simple chart components.

typography.display: Smiley Sans / Noto Sans CJK SC
typography.ppt_fallback: Microsoft YaHei / Arial Rounded MT Bold / Arial
typography.headline_treatment: bold short titles with playful scale contrast, no cramped paragraphs

layout_rules: Use geometric motifs as controlled accents, not background clutter.
Keep body text short and large enough for event viewing.
One bright accent family per slide; avoid rainbow scatter.
ppt.media_policy: Use event photos, posters, venue maps, badges, and generated flat motif packs. Keep text and schedules editable.
ppt.chart_policy: Use simple timelines, icon grids, agenda lists, comparison cards, and attendance/funnel charts.
ppt.animation_hint: Use snappy reveal for schedule and event moments; avoid excessive bounce.

styles.description_summary: A vivid Memphis Pop direction for youth, festival, culture, and event decks that need energy without losing editability.
styles.recommendation_text: Memphis pop festival event vivid geometric creative youth launch music culture 活泼 孟菲斯 波普 活动 音乐节 年轻 创意

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Risograph Zine

source.readme_summary: Handmade zine direction with duotone screen-print imagery, hard edges, collage rhythm, and guide-like components.

avoid_for: datasets requiring many precise chart colors

typography.display: Smiley Sans / Noto Sans CJK SC / Impact
typography.headline_treatment: poster-like hard-edge titles with generous line-height and tactile imperfections kept in image layers

layout_rules: Use hard edges and intentional offset shapes. Border radius should usually be 0.
Use one spot-color pairing per section; do not create uncontrolled rainbow zine pages.
Keep guide information, labels, and tables editable above texture layers.
ppt.media_policy: Use duotone source photos, collage scans, risograph process images, maps, and generated screen-print textures. Do not bake real addresses, prices, schedules, or labels into generated images.
ppt.chart_policy: Use guide components: agenda list, timeline, vertical list, numbered steps, icon grid, pillars, tables, and labeled cards.
ppt.animation_hint: Use page-flip, stamp, or cut-paper reveal sparingly; keep reading order stable.

styles.description_summary: A tactile Risograph zine direction for indie culture and guide decks, pairing rich image texture with editable lists, steps, maps, and labels.
styles.recommendation_text: Risograph riso zine indie bookstore screen print duotone collage handmade guide 手作 独立书店 小志 孔版印刷 双色 拼贴 图片丰富

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Brutalist Newspaper

source.readme_summary: Brutalist newspaper style with stark typography, mono-ink surfaces, red signals, columns, halftone assets, and editorial urgency.

typography.display: Noto Serif CJK SC / Source Serif 4
typography.body: Noto Sans CJK SC / IBM Plex Sans
typography.mono: Sarasa Mono SC / IBM Plex Mono
typography.ppt_fallback: Songti SC / Microsoft YaHei / Cambria / Consolas
typography.headline_treatment: stark newspaper headlines with disciplined columns and no decorative bevels

layout_rules: Use columns and rules as editorial structure. Do not make fake UI dashboards.
Keep red as a signal color only.
Use halftone or newsprint texture lightly and never under small body copy.
ppt.media_policy: Use source screenshots, archival images, halftone portraits, tables, and document crops. Generated texture may be used as newsprint atmosphere only.
ppt.chart_policy: Use annotated tables, timelines, slope charts, bar charts, and evidence boxes with clear source notes.
ppt.animation_hint: Reveal as a newspaper investigation: headline, lead, evidence, implication.

styles.description_summary: A stark newspaper editorial direction for reports and trend dossiers that need urgency, columns, source clips, and disciplined red signals.
styles.recommendation_text: Brutalist newspaper editorial annual report AI industry halftone mono ink red signal investigation dossier 报章 粗野主义 年度观察 社论 调查 黑白红

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Engineering Blueprint

source.readme_summary: Developer and infrastructure decks with dense architecture diagrams, process flows, client-server maps, dark technical palettes, and editable SVG proof objects.

typography.display: Noto Sans CJK SC / IBM Plex Sans
typography.headline_treatment: precise technical claim titles; diagrams and code labels need more weight than decorative glow

layout_rules: Architecture diagrams should declare node types, ports, and connector grammar before rendering.
Use dark blueprint surfaces only when labels stay readable at preview size.
Prefer native SVG diagrams over generated technical imagery.
ppt.media_policy: Use real product screenshots, architecture sketches, terminal snippets, system diagrams, and source docs. Generated images may provide quiet dark technical atmosphere only.
ppt.chart_policy: Use hub-spoke, process flow, client-server flow, vertical pillars, dependency maps, matrix tables, and latency/cost charts.
ppt.animation_hint: Reveal architecture by layer, data path, or responsibility boundary.

styles.description_summary: A dense engineering blueprint direction for infrastructure, Kubernetes, AI agents, and developer-tool decks where diagrams are the proof object.
styles.recommendation_text: Engineering Blueprint Kubernetes Claude Code agent architecture infrastructure developer technical diagram process flow client server 系统架构 工程蓝图 技术架构 云原生 智能体工程

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Top Consulting

source.readme_summary: Consulting-style strategy deck with issue framing, customer profile, root cause, pillars, initiatives, and roadmap.

typography.display: Noto Sans CJK SC / Helvetica Neue
typography.body: Noto Sans CJK SC / IBM Plex Sans
typography.headline_treatment: executive claim titles, concise labels, no decorative ambiguity

layout_rules: Use pyramid/SCQA logic before choosing the consulting surface.
Make the recommendation traceable from challenge to root cause to initiatives.
Roadmap slides need time axis, owner or workstream, and success metric.
ppt.media_policy: Use company context images, customer insight visuals, simple icons, and roadmap backgrounds. Do not use generic corporate stock photos as proof.
ppt.chart_policy: Use gap charts, root-cause trees, strategic pillar diagrams, initiative matrices, customer profiles, and roadmap timelines.
ppt.animation_hint: Reveal logic in consulting order: situation, complication, insight, recommendation.

styles.description_summary: A sober top-consulting direction for business diagnosis, customer strategy, initiatives, and executive roadmap decks.
styles.recommendation_text: Top Consulting strategy root cause roadmap loyalty customer profile executive recommendation business diagnosis 咨询 战略 根因 路线图 客户画像 忠诚度

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Luxury Editorial Digest

source.readme_summary: Image-rich luxury editorial decks with dark premium surfaces, serif headlines, brand/product photography, and digest pacing.

typography.headline_treatment: magazine-serif headlines with generous leading and restrained gold accents

layout_rules: Product or lifestyle imagery must be the main visual evidence.
Use serif editorial hierarchy, but keep captions and labels readable.
Avoid using gold as a blanket theme; reserve it for hierarchy and premium signals.
ppt.media_policy: Use rights-clear fashion, home, product, material, event, or lookbook images. Generated images can provide moodboard texture, not fake brand/product evidence.
ppt.chart_policy: Use trend grids, material matrices, editorial ranking lists, galleries, and captioned comparison spreads rather than dense quantitative charts.
ppt.animation_hint: Use magazine pacing: hero image, caption, detail, editorial takeaway.

styles.description_summary: An image-rich luxury magazine direction for fashion, home design, lifestyle, and trend digest decks.
styles.recommendation_text: Luxury Editorial Digest fashion home design lookbook trend magazine lifestyle premium champagne 家居 时尚 奢华 美学周鉴 趋势 生活方式 图片丰富

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Eastern Culture Narrative

source.readme_summary: Chinese cultural storytelling with plant-dye palettes, craft imagery, poetic color tokens, ink-paper surfaces, and restrained traditional typography.

typography.display: Noto Serif CJK SC / KaiTi / STKaiti
typography.body: Noto Sans CJK SC / PingFang SC
typography.headline_treatment: poetic but readable Chinese titles; preserve line-height and avoid cramped calligraphy blocks

layout_rules: Use cultural color tokens as semantic evidence, not arbitrary decoration.
Craft/process slides should show material, action, transformation, and cultural meaning.
Traditional typography must stay readable in projection and PPTX export.
ppt.media_policy: Use source images of artifacts, craft process, plants, textile, paper, ceramics, places, and manuscripts. Generated imagery may provide paper/ink atmosphere only.
ppt.chart_policy: Use color-token grids, process steps, artifact decomposition, timelines, quote spreads, and comparison tables.
ppt.animation_hint: Reveal cultural meaning from object to process to metaphor.

styles.description_summary: A Chinese cultural narrative direction for craft, heritage, plant dye, literature, and poetic object-based decks.
styles.recommendation_text: Eastern Chinese culture plant dye craft heritage ink poetic color intangible heritage 李子柒 藏拙 东方 中国文化 植物染 非遗 手作 水墨 传统色

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Image-Text Layout Showcase

source.readme_summary: Twenty image-text composition patterns including left/right image, full bleed, Z flow, grid collage, circle radial, diagonal split, papercut, montage, and poster layouts.

avoid_for: paper deck where source figures must stay no-crop

typography.headline_treatment: image-led editorial titles; each layout must declare image role and text role before rendering

layout_rules: Use this as a layout vocabulary, not as one deck style copied page by page.
Every image needs slot, crop focal point, text-safe area, and caption policy.
Avoid using more than two expressive image treatments in one ordinary production deck unless it is a layout showcase.
ppt.media_policy: Use source images, generated concept images, or rights-clear visuals; text remains editable and outside baked image content.
ppt.chart_policy: Use sparingly. This style is primarily about image-text composition; diagrams/charts should be foreground SVG objects when needed.
ppt.animation_hint: Reveal image, title, caption, and annotation in reading order.

styles.description_summary: A layout-vocabulary direction for image-text decks, useful when the main challenge is composition variety and image containment.
styles.recommendation_text: Image Text Layout Showcase collage gallery poster visual essay portfolio image slot crop focal point 图文混排 图片排版 版式展示 拼贴 作品集 视觉散文

styles.label: PPT Master Case: Urban Renewal Editorial

source.source_category: Urban Renewal / Architecture Humanities / Museum Exhibition
source.readme_summary: Architecture and urban humanities decks with before/after imagery, timelines, heritage context, museum exhibition pacing, and social-problem framing.

typography.display: Noto Serif CJK SC / Georgia / KaiTi
typography.headline_treatment: humanities claim titles with precise captions and before/after evidence labels

layout_rules: Before/after images need matched framing and honest labels.
Humanities biography slides should connect person, place, work, and historical constraint.
Museum/exhibition pacing can be quiet, but each page still needs a claim or object focus.
ppt.media_policy: Use source images of buildings, archives, maps, portraits, before/after comparisons, and exhibition objects. Generated imagery may only provide atmosphere or concept background.
ppt.chart_policy: Use timelines, before/after comparisons, maps, policy option matrices, case tables, and problem KPI pages.
ppt.animation_hint: Reveal before/after, timeline, and case evidence in a documentary rhythm.

styles.description_summary: An architecture-humanities direction for urban renewal, museum exhibition, biography, heritage, and before/after case decks.
styles.recommendation_text: Urban renewal architecture museum heritage before after biography exhibition Lin Huiyin city case 城市更新 建筑人文 展陈 林徽因 高层住宅 遗产保护 前后对比
